examples: "Fangirling" is a term used to describe extreme excitement over a certain fandom.
He says he fully embraces the level of fandom which is associated with the show, especially those who dress up.
She's someone the fans love and she already understands that world of fandom, so I thought this was the perfect union.
There is no joy in SoCal baseball fandom, the mighty local teams have struck out.
Perhaps these Packer fans are on the cusp of a new age of fandom.
